---
name: Security Issue
about: Report a security vulnerability (do not disclose publicly!)
title: "[SECURITY] <brief description>"
labels: security
---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Do NOT submit security issues publicly

If you've found a security vulnerability, **do NOT open this issue**. Instead:

1. Email: **carlostorresada@gmail.com** with subject `[SECURITY] <description>`
2. Describe the vulnerability (no exploit code for 0-day)
3. Include affected component and severity estimate

See our [Security Policy](.github/SECURITY.md) for details.

---

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (immediate exploitation risk)
- [ ] High (likely exploitable with impact)
- [ ] Medium (exploitable but limited impact)
- [ ] Low (theoretical or requires user error)

## Description

Briefly describe the vulnerability (general terms; no exploit code for 0-day).

## Affected component

- [ ] CLI argument parsing
- [ ] Matrix loading from untrusted source
- [ ] File system operations
- [ ] Network communication
- [ ] Subprocess execution
- [ ] Other: __________

## Remediation suggestions

Any ideas on how to fix this?
